{{Quote|Now, you've probably never heard of the Dimeans, but at the time they were a nasty lot led by a nastier overlord named Kraat.|Jolee Bindo|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
The '''Dimeans''' were a tall [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Dimea system/Legends|Dimea system]], known for their nasty disposition. Many [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Mandalorian Wars]], they were ruled by an overlord named [[Kraat]]. After capturing the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Andor Vex]], Kraat was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when he threw the man down an intake shaft, inadvertently causing his [[Warship/Legends|warship]] to explode. The loss of the leader had a significant effect on the Dimeans and affected the political course of that [[Sector/Legends|sector]] for many years.

==Biology and appearance==
{{Quote|Tall fellow. Big teeth.|Jolee Bindo describes Kraat|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
The Dimeans were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known for their nasty disposition. Their [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]], [[Kraat]], was considered a tall individual by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jolee Bindo]] and had large [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was strong enough to crush a Human's throat.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==History==
{{Quote|Kraat dies horribly, and the Dimeans never quite recovered. Changed the political course of the entire sector for centuries to come. I'd call that quite a destiny, wouldn't you?|Jolee Bindo|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
The Dimean species were native to the [[Dimea system/Legends|Dimea]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]], located in the eastern portion of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEAOC" /> They were more active in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in the years prior to the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. At this time, they were led by an overlord named Kraat, who was particularly nasty for his species. Kraat commanded a Dimean [[Warship/Legends|warship]], and on one occasion overtook a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] containing two members of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]—Jolee Bindo and [[Andor Vex]]. Among the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], Vex was believed to have a significant destiny to fulfill. Consequently, a mythos of perceived infallibility arose around him, and Vex himself soon began to believe in it.<ref name="KOTOR" />

When the Dimean overlord hauled Vex and Bindo aboard his bridge for questioning, Vex demanded the Dimean release him, confident that his destiny would prevent him from dying here. Kraat reacted by crushing the man's throat and throwing him down a giant energy intake shaft. That inadvertently caused a reaction with the warship's reactor, setting off alarms and eventually causing the warship to explode. While Bindo escaped the starship, Kraat was killed.<ref name="KOTOR" />

The repercussions for Dimean society from that event were profound. The species never recovered their former strength, and the political course of that [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of space was affected for centuries. Jolee Bindo retold these events to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]—an amnesiac Jedi—during his quest to find the [[Star Forge]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Dimeans were created for ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', a roleplaying [[Star Wars video games|computer game]] produced by [[BioWare]] in [[2003]]. They never appeared in the game, but were described by Jolee Bindo during conversations with Revan.<ref name="KOTOR" />
